products.name: Metal Detection Sensors
products.descriptor: Inline inductive sensors for real-time ferrous and non-ferrous metal detection

evidence.snippet:
### Metal Detection Sensors
_Act on metallics—inline._
Real-time inductive detection of ferrous and non-ferrous metals—delivering precise, position-accurate signals for cleaner output, higher recovery, and reliable uptime. [Learn more.](https://headwall.com/metal-detection-sensors/)

unresolved_questions: Airborne Hyperspectral Payloads product page (headwall.com/airborne-hyperspectral-payloads) was skipped_class_budget — individual airborne payload SKUs and sub-models not enumerable from corpus.
Benchtop Hyperspectral Imaging Kits product page (headwall.com/benchtop-hyperspectral-imaging-kits) was skipped_class_budget — specific kit configurations and variants unknown.
Metal Detection Sensors product page (headwall.com/metal-detection-sensors) was skipped_class_budget — individual sensor models and form factors not visible.

All hub.headwall.com datasheets (HELIOS EQ32/EC64/EC32, ALPHA G100, BlueEye Gen2, Micro-Hyperspec VNIR E-Series/SWIR 640, MV.C VNIR, SIF Imaging Sensor, Nano HP Rotary Stage Packages, Turnkey Drone Packages) were skipped_out_of_scope — detailed spectral range, pixel count, and integration specs unavailable.
SIF Imaging Sensor: 'SIF' likely refers to Solar-Induced Fluorescence but not confirmed from fetched corpus pages; datasheet was out of scope.
ALPHA G100 Real-Time Processing Platform: whether this is an embedded payload-side unit or a rack-mounted ground processor is unclear without the datasheet.

fetch_requests.reason: Product page for airborne payloads was skipped; needed to enumerate individual payload SKUs, drone-compatible models, and sub-product details.
Product page for benchtop kits was skipped; needed to enumerate specific kit SKUs and configurations.
Product page for metal detection sensors was skipped; needed to identify specific sensor models and form factors.
Datasheet for HELIOS EQ32 would confirm spectral range, pixel count, and airborne/industrial suitability.
Datasheet for ALPHA G100 would clarify whether it is an embedded payload-side processor or ground station unit.
Datasheet for SIF Imaging Sensor would confirm it is a solar-induced fluorescence sensor and provide spectral specs.
Datasheet would enumerate which drone platforms and hyperspectral sensors are included in the turnkey packages.
